error.signature: JSON parse error during streaming — incomplete JSON in stream chunk

verdict.summary: Parsing JSON from streamed LLM output fails because chunks contain incomplete JSON.

dead_ends.why_fails: Stream chunks are arbitrary byte boundaries, not JSON boundaries

dead_ends.action: Wait for a closing brace to trigger parsing
dead_ends.why_fails: Nested objects have multiple closing braces; triggering on first } gives incomplete parse

workarounds.action: Accumulate stream chunks into a buffer and parse only when complete
workarounds.how: buffer += chunk; try: result = json.loads(buffer) except: continue

workarounds.action: Use a streaming JSON parser that handles partial input
workarounds.how: Use libraries like partial-json-parser or ijson
